rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF SVIATOSLAV BOZHENKO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/22/19: 1. Please file an ex parte petition to increase bond. 2. Please file the original account statements to confirm the ending assets on hand. 3. Helene Wenzel must receive or waive proper notice pursuant to her Request for Special Notice filed 5/24/17. 4. The caption does not include the request for conservator's fees. If such fees are to be ordered, Petitioner must amend the Petition to include the request in the caption and give proper notice to all interested parties. CRC 7.50 & 7.102. Endorsed-filed copies of all additional pleadings must be received in Room 202 no later than 4/16/19.
